summary: A dashboard that shows the user's daily habits split into a **today** summary at the top and a scrollable habit list below.
overview:
The Habit Dashboard is the home screen of the habits area. It gives a quick glance at today's progress and lets the user tap a habit to mark it done or open its detail screen.

Goals:
- Show today's completion ratio at a glance.
- List all active habits with their streaks.
- Allow quick toggle of completion for today.

components.name: HabitRow
components.usage: Each item in the habit list.
components.notes: Already has icon, title, streak, and trailing checkbox.

components.name: ProgressRing
components.notes: Add a center label slot to show the percentage.

components.name: HabitDashboardEmptyState
components.usage: Shown in the habit list when there are no habits.
components.notes: New component: illustration + 'Add your first habit' CTA.

structure:
The screen is a `Column` split into two sections divided by a horizontal divider:

1. **Top summary** — fixed height, shows today's progress ring and a short label.
2. **Habit list** — `weight(1f)`, a scrollable `LazyColumn` of habit rows.

sections.title: Top summary
sections.description: A `Row` with a circular progress indicator on the left and a `Column` of two `Text`s on the right (percentage and motivational label).
sections.behavior: Updates reactively as habits are toggled. No tap action.

sections.title: Habit list
sections.description: A `LazyColumn` of `HabitRow` items. Each row reuses the existing `HabitRow` component: leading icon, title, streak count, trailing checkbox.
sections.behavior: Tapping the checkbox toggles today's completion. Tapping the row navigates to habit detail. Shows an empty state when there are no habits.

endpoints.name: Get habits
endpoints.notes: Called on screen load; drives the list and the summary.

endpoints.name: Toggle habit completion
endpoints.notes: Called when the user toggles the checkbox; optimistic UI update.

persistence: Habits are cached in **Room** so the screen renders offline. The network result updates the cache; the UI observes the Room table via a `Flow`.

tasks.title: Create package and navigation entry
tasks.spec: Create the package `com.example.app.feature.habits` and a `HabitDashboardScreen` composable wired into Navigation 3. Render an empty `Scaffold` named `HabitDashboardScaffold`.
acceptance_criteria: Navigating to the habits route shows an empty scaffold

tasks.title: Static macro layout
tasks.spec: Implement the two-section `Column`: fixed-height top summary placeholder and a `weight(1f)` list placeholder, divided by a `HorizontalDivider`.
acceptance_criteria: Two sections render with the divider between them

tasks.title: Habit list UI with HabitRow
tasks.spec: Render a `LazyColumn` of `HabitRow` items from static sample data, including the empty state.
acceptance_criteria: Rows show icon, title, streak, and checkbox
Empty state shows when the list is empty

tasks.title: Data layer and endpoints
tasks.spec: Add the `Habit` model, a Room entity/DAO, and a repository that fetches `GET /api/habits` and exposes a `Flow` from Room.
acceptance_criteria: Repository returns cached habits via Flow

tasks.title: ViewModel, summary, and toggle
tasks.spec: Add a ViewModel exposing UI state; wire the list and the top summary ratio. Implement optimistic toggle via `POST /api/habits/{id}/toggle`.
acceptance_criteria: Toggling updates UI immediately and persists
